data.title: Texas Instruments, despite slight Q4 miss, guides above for Q1 with stock rising; post-quarter gains noted.
data.description: Texas Instruments reported fourth-quarter results that fell slightly below estimates, with earnings and revenue slightly missing expectations. However, the company provided guidance for the current period that surpassed analyst views. This news caused TXN stock to increase. After posting roughly in-line results for Q4, Texas Instruments guided above estimates for Q1. This information was presented in an article on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Intellia Therapeutics stock surged after FDA approval to restart gene-editing study.
data.description: Intellia Therapeutics experienced a significant increase in their stock value on Tuesday following an announcement from the FDA permitting the company to resume a gene-editing study. This development caused a surge in the beleaguered company's stock, reflecting renewed investor confidence.

data.title: Pinterest stock drops after company announces cutting nearly 15% of workforce to prioritize AI development.
data.description: Pinterest's stock experienced a decline following the announcement of the company's decision to reduce its workforce by approximately 15%. The move is part of Pinterest's strategy to reallocate resources towards Artificial Intelligence (AI) initiatives. The restructuring aims to enhance the company's focus on AI technologies.

data.title: Space Asset Acquisition Corp. priced $200M IPO with 20M units at $10/unit, trading on Nasdaq with ticker symbol “SAAQU” on Jan. 28, 2026.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, Space Asset Acquisition Corp. revealed the pricing details of their initial public offering, consisting of 20,000,000 units priced at $10.00 per unit. These units are scheduled to start trading on January 28, 2026, on The Nasdaq Global Market under the ticker symbol "SAAQU."

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow drops 400 points, S&P 500 at record high, Reddit suffers losses. Live coverage updates.
data.description: Today in the stock market, the S&P 500 reached a record high, closing at a new level. Conversely, small cap stocks did not perform as well. Reddit experienced significant losses. The Dow Jones Industrial Average dropped by 400 points due to UnitedHealth's decline, while the S&P 500 achieved a new record. This news was covered live by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: GCC, S.A.B. de C.V. reports Q4 and full year 2025 results; a leading cement supplier in US & Mexico.
data.description: In Chihuahua, Mexico on January 27, 2026, GCC, S.A.B. de C.V. (BMV: GCC*) revealed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The company, known for its supply and production of cement, aggregates, and concrete in the United States and Mexico, reported its earnings for this period.

data.title: CMC (NYSE: CMC) named on Corporate Knights' 2026 Global 100 Most Sustainable Corporations list for the first time.
data.description: In Irving, Texas on January 27, 2026, CMC (NYSE: CMC) revealed their inclusion in Corporate Knights' 2026 Global 100 Most Sustainable Corporations list. This is the first time CMC has appeared on this esteemed list, which is released by Corporate Knights on a yearly basis. The company's recognition underscores its commitment to sustainability and responsible business practices.

data.title: F5 stock (NASDAQ: FFIV) rallies post Q1 earnings beat. Earnings: $4.45 per share vs $3.65 est. Revenue: $822.47M vs $758.08M est.
data.description: After F5, Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIV) released its first quarter earnings report, the company saw an increase in shares during extended trading on Tuesday. The report exceeded expectations in both top and bottom-line figures. In particular, F5 reported earnings of $4.45 per share, surpassing the analyst consensus estimate of $3.65 by 21.88%. Additionally, quarterly revenue reached $822.47 million, outperforming the Street estimate of $758.08 million. A notable highlight from the quarter was the 37% growth in systems revenue to $218 million. For more details on this news, visit Benzinga.com. FFIV stock is currently in motion, making it worthwhile to monitor the price action.

data.title: Comerica Bank starts 11th North Texas Prom Dress Drive on Feb 2. Donations at 7 centers.
data.description: In February, Comerica Bank in Dallas will be organizing its 11th annual North Texas Prom Dress Drive. The initiative invites the community to donate new or gently used formal dresses and accessories such as shoes, purses, and jewelry at seven designated banking centers. The event aims to collect outfits to support individuals attending prom.

data.title: Justin Shubow appointed chairman of Beautifying Transportation Infrastructure Council by U.S. Secretary of Transportation Sean Duffy. Jan. 27, 2026.
data.description: In Washington on January 27, 2026, Sean Duffy, the U.S. Secretary of Transportation, announced the appointment of Justin Shubow, the president of the National Civic Art Society, as the chairman of the newly established Beautifying Transportation Infrastructure Council. This council, a first of its kind, aims to enhance the aesthetic appeal of transportation infrastructure across the country. This move signifies a strategic effort by the U.S. Department of Transportation to prioritize the visual aspect of transportation development.

data.title: Nextpower Arabia will supply 2.25 GW of smart solar trackers to L&T for ACWA Power Consortium's Bisha Solar Project.
data.description: In Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, Nextpower Arabia, a joint venture between Nextpower (Nasdaq: NXT, formerly Nextracker) and Abunayyan Holding, has revealed plans to supply 2.25 gigawatts (GWp) of cutting-edge solar tracking systems to Larsen & Toubro (L&T) for the Bisha Solar project. This initiative is a major component of one of the largest utility-scale solar plants under development by an ACWA Power-led consortium. Notably, the Saudi Power Procurement Company (SPPC) secured this project as a part of Wave 6.

data.title: AccountTECH research shows 70% of brokerages had positive EBITDA in 2025, up sharply from 2023. Significant profitability increase.
data.description: In 2025, almost 70% of companies recorded positive EBITDA, marking a substantial increase from the figures in 2023. This data was disclosed by AccountTECH in their recent annual brokerage financial benchmark research. The findings indicate a noteworthy and persistent upswing in the proportion of businesses with favorable EBITDA statistics.

data.title: TWG introduces Pullmaster 40 M/H winch for fishing/towing industry. Newest addition to M & H Series; meant for marine use.
data.description: In Downers Grove, Illinois on January 27, 2026, TWG, a division of Dover (NYSE: DOV), unveiled the Pullmaster® 40 M/H Planetary Winch as part of its M & H Series. This latest addition is crafted to address the needs of the toughest marine environments.

data.title: Associated Banc-Corp declared $0.24 quarterly dividend per share and announced share repurchase program.
data.description: In Green Bay, Wisconsin, on January 27, 2026, the Board of Directors of Associated Banc-Corp (NYSE: ASB) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.24 per common share. This dividend will be paid out on March 16, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 2, 2026.

data.title: Starwood Property Trust to announce Q4 and full year 2025 results on Feb 25, 2026, before NYSE trading opens.
data.description: In Miami Beach, Florida, on January 27, 2026, Starwood Property Trust (NYSE: STWD) revealed plans to unveil its financial results for Q4 and full year 2025 on February 25, 2026, before the NYSE trading session begins. This announcement comes as the company gears up to provide insights into its performance for the specified period. Trading of the company's stocks is set to be influenced by these forthcoming figures, as investors await to assess the impact on the market value of STWD shares. The disclosed data will likely offer crucial information for stakeholders and analysts to evaluate the company's financial health and make informed decisions regarding their investments in Starwood Property Trust.

data.title: Stockholders approve SM Energy & Civitas merger - all proposals passed. Closing of merger expected soon.
data.description: SM Energy Company (NYSE: SM) and Civitas Resources, Inc. (NYSE: CIVI) revealed today that their stockholders have approved all required proposals for the finalization of the merger agreement between the two companies. The successful vote signifies a significant step forward in the consolidation process. This announcement comes following the recent vote and marks a key milestone as both companies move towards completing the merger deal.

data.title: BD board authorizes more buybacks & declares $1.05/share dividend. Completed $250M repurchase in FY26.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, in Franklin Lakes, N.J., the Board of Directors of BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company) declared a quarterly dividend of $1.05 per common share. This leading global medical technology company's dividend will be paid on March 31, 2026, to holders of the company's common stock (NYSE: BDX).

data.title: Ares Commercial Real Estate Corp to announce Q4 and full-year earnings on Feb 10, 2026, prior to NYSE opening. Webcast at 12:00 pm ET.
data.description: Ares Commercial Real Estate Corporation (NYSE: ACRE) revealed its plans to disclose earnings for the final quarter and entire year concluded on December 31, 2025, on Tuesday, February 10, 2026. The report will be released before the New York Stock Exchange opens. Additionally, Ares Commercial Real Estate Corporation will host a webcast/conference call on the same day at 12:00 p.m. Eastern Time to delve into the financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2025. All parties interested are invited to attend.
VALE 4Q IRON ORE OUTPUT 90.40M METRIC TONNES, EST. 89.06M

data.title: REJUVA FRESH® reveals 3 new technologies for providers in 2026; helps enhance practice success.
data.description: In Ellsworth, Maine, on January 27, 2026, providers are adopting three cutting-edge products from REJUVA FRESH® to enhance aesthetic and wellness practices. These new creations aim to revolutionize traditional methods and equip businesses with the tools for success.
